rationale: Updated Pentest orphan cleanup name fallback so it is used only when no explicit task, step, or runner-profile selector filter is requested; added a regression assertion for filtered lookup.
Automated review summary with no distinct actionable request beyond the inline review comments.
Changed PentestExecutionPolicy max_attempts and automatic_retries_enabled from Literal constants to standard int/bool fields with conservative defaults.
Changed failure-classification diagnostics to dict[str, Any] and added recursive string redaction that preserves structured metadata.
Human-readable review summary whose actionable points are covered by inline comments 3127256646 and 3127256656.
